popularStory.headline: Malcolm III, King of Scotland
popularStory.description: Malcolm III, called Canmore (d. 1098), king of Scotland, succeeded to the kingdom of Duncan I, his father, by the defeat of Macbeth [q.v.] on 27 July 1054, by Earl Siward of Northumbria.  This victory …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Malcolm III King of Scotland於1031年3月26日出生在蘇格蘭培爾布萊爾 阿爾時，他的父親Duncan I King of Scotland29歲，母親Suthen22歲。他於大約1059年與Ingebjørg Finnsdotter結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1093年11月13日在英國蘇格蘭享年62歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林登福姆林 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Malcolm III King of Scotland于1031年3月26日出生在苏格兰培爾布萊爾 阿爾时，他的父亲Duncan I King of Scotland29岁，母亲Suthen22岁。他于大约1059年与Ingebjørg Finnsdotter结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1093年11月13日在英国苏格兰享年62岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林登福姆林 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Malcolm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the medieval Gaelic name Mael Coluim ‘devotee of St Columba’. Columba was a 6th-century monk of Irish origin who played a leading part in the conversion to Christianity of Scotland and northern England; see also Callum and Colm . He has always been one of the most popular saints in Scotland, but in the Middle Ages it was felt to be presumptuous to give the names of saints directly to children; instead their blessing was invoked by prefixing the name with mael ‘devotee of’ or gille ‘servant of’. Since the 1930s the given name has been used widely in the English-speaking world, not just by those with Scottish connections.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: When Malcolm III King of Scotland was born on 26 March 1031, in Blair Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, his father, Duncan I King of Scotland, was 29 and his mother, Suthen, was 22. He married Ingebjørg Finnsdotter about 1059. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 13 November 1093, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Malcolm III King of Scotland est né le 26 mars 1031, à Blair Atholl, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Duncan I King of Scotland, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Suthen, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Ingebjørg Finnsdotter environ 1059. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 13 novembre 1093, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Malcolm III King of Scotland am 26. März 1031 in Blair Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Duncan I King of Scotland 29 und seine Mutter Suthen 22. Er hat um 1059 Ingebjørg Finnsdotter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 13. November 1093 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Malcolm III King of Scotland è nato il il 26 marzo 1031 nel Blair Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Duncan I King of Scotland, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Suthen, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Ingebjørg Finnsdotter circa 1059. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 13 novembre 1093, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Malcolm III King of Scotlandが1031年3月26日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアブレイル アソルで生まれた時，父Duncan I King of Scotlandは29歳，母Suthenは22歳であった。約1059年にIngebjørg Finnsdotterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1093年11月13日にイギリススコットランドで62歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインダンフエルムライン アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Scone Abbey, Perthshire, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 드 스콘 스콘 플리오리
ko.Scone Priory, Old Scone, Perthshire, Sco: 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 드 스콘 스콘 플리오리
ko.Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fifeshir: 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인 던퍼라이인 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Malcolm III King of Scotland(이)가 1031년 3월 26일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 블레이르 앳홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Duncan I King of Scotland(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Suthen(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1059년 Ingebjørg Finnsdotter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1093년 11월 13일 영국 스코틀랜드에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인 던퍼라이인 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Malcolm III King of Scotland nasceu em 26 de março de 1031, em Blair Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Duncan I King of Scotland, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Suthen, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Ingebjørg Finnsdotter aproximadamente 1059. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 13 de novembro de 1093, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Malcolm III King of Scotland родился 26 марта 1031 г. в местности блеир атолл, пиртшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Duncan I King of Scotland было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Suthen, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Ingebjørg Finnsdotter около 1059 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 13 ноября 1093 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности дунфирмлаин эбби, дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Malcolm III King of Scotland nació el 26 de marzo de 1031, en Blair Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Duncan I King of Scotland, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Suthen, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Ingebjørg Finnsdotter aproximadamente 1059. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 13 de noviembre de 1093, en Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido.
